label: plain_text
text:
"By
the multiplication of the
numerator a
and
the
denominator
of each of the fractions
s by t
the other
denominators, the fractions
are reduced to a common denominator. Then, in case of addition,
the
numerators
(obtained after
r the above reduction)
are added.
In case of subtraction, their
difference is taken."
(Brahmagupta,
Brahmasphutasiddhanta, Verse
e 12.2, 628 CE)
